# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Google Compute Engine instances. Use default service account and default disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting instances running - we'll add custom encryption keys and security hardening in phase 2.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

```yml
resources:
- name: instance1
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: f1-micro
    disks:
      - deviceName: boot
        sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/debian-9-stretch-v20190616
      - deviceName: persistent-disk-1
        type: pd-standard
        boot: false
        autoDelete: true
    networkInterfaces:
      - accessConfigs:
          - name: External NAT
            type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
    serviceAccounts:
      - email: default
        scopes:
          - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
    labels:
      environment: production

- name: instance2
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-b
    machineType: f1-micro
    disks:
      - deviceName: boot
        sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/debian-9-stretch-v20190616
      - deviceName: persistent-disk-2
        type: pd-standard
        boot: false
        autoDelete: true
    networkInterfaces:
      - accessConfigs:
          - name: External NAT
            type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
    serviceAccounts:
      - email: default
        scopes:
          - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
    labels:
      environment: production

- name: instanceGroup
  type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
  properties:
    namedPorts:
      - name: http
        port: 80
    baseInstanceName: myinstances
    instances:
      - name: myinstance
    targetSize: 2
    autoScalingPolicy:
      minSize: 1
      maxSize: 10

- name: instanceGroupManager
  type: compute.v1.automaticManagedPlacement
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    updatePolicy:
      minReadySec: 300
      maxSurge: 2
      maxUnavailable: 0

- name: targetPool
  type: compute.v1.targetPool
  properties:
    instances:
      - myinstance
    healthCheck: 
      name: default-ssh-check
    region: us-central1
    sessionAffinity: None
